title: manah #4487
definition:
1) to count, reckon, number, assign, tell, appoint, prepare
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to count, number
        1a2) reckon, assign, appoint
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be counted, be numbered
        1b2) to be reckoned, be assigned
    1c) (Piel) to appoint, ordain
    1d) (Pual) appointed (participle)
